title: Before Making AI Agent Systems Smarter, First Make Them Trustworthy
summary: When we pin all our hopes on the "intelligence" of LLM, we forget that intelligence's uncertainty must be underpinned by engineering's certainty. An intelligence that cannot be reproduced, debugged, or observed is more like a spectacular but uncontrolled magic trick.
content: When we pin all our hopes on the "intelligence" of LLM, we forget that intelligence's uncertainty must be underpinned by engineering's certainty. An intelligence that cannot be reproduced, debugged, or observed is more like a spectacular but uncontrolled magic trick.
